description.en: Basic file conversion with limited features
description.zh: 基本文件转换，功能有限

weaknesses.en: Limited features in the free tier
No specific mention of commercial use

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses needing file conversion
targetAudience.zh: 需要文件转换的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: CloudConvert positions itself as a versatile online tool for file conversion for individuals and small businesses.
positioning.zh: CloudConvert 定位自己为适用于个人和小型企业的多功能在线文件转换工具
